name: Milo's Dream
short_description: A top-down adventure game about a doggy in a world of dreams, featuring colorful pixelated visuals and chiptune songs.
detailed_description:
Milo’s Dream is an adventure game in 2D top-down perspective about a doggy called Milo who sets out on a mission to save the fairy world from the evil King Big Flea and his army of giant insects.

Milo is a very smart and playful dog! You may not know, but he has already saved the world once! Now he needs to find a way to defeat King Big Flea who is terrorizing the fairy kingdom with his evil henchmen.

On his journey, Milo will find many magical items that will help him on his mission and allow him to use special powers and abilities. Some of them are hidden throughout the world, others are protected by powerful enemies and others can be purchased in the fairy shops, using your bone stock to buy them. So if you find any little bones lying around, don’t hesitate to pick them up, because they will be very useful! The time to save the fairy world has come and only you can help Milo in this mission!

FEATURES

  • 4 distinct biomes with unique visuals to explore;

  • Colorful pixelated 8-bit style graphics;

  • Cute chiptune style music;

  • Lots of useful items to find and equip;

  • Simplified experience level system;

  • Box pushing puzzles;

  • Play alone or with a friend;

  • Alternative paths.
